summary: Iteration 3 testing for EndocrinoPront Pro. Tested all new endpoints from 8 PRs Codex integration: glucose, lab-results, bioimpedance backend endpoints + patient profile tabs (Exames, Glicemia, Bioimpedância). All 27 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tabs load, show real data, and modals work correctly. No critical bugs found.

issues: Date input uses browser native date picker (not a custom/shadcn calendar). Minor UX inconsistency.

action_items: CARRIED OVER (CRITICAL from iter2): Consultation autosave field name mismatch - frontend sends {subjetivo,objetivo,avaliacao,plano} but backend expects {anamnese,exameFisico,diagnostico,prescricao}. Fix in /app/src/lib/api/consultation-api.ts.
MINOR: Templates library page uses hardcoded templates instead of fetching from /api/v1/templates (carried over from iter2).
critical_code_review_comments: glucoseApi.analysis() in /app/src/lib/api/glucose-api.ts computes analysis LOCALLY (fetches all items then calculates average/min/max/total/inRangePercent in JS). The backend GET /glucose/analyze endpoint exists but is unused by the frontend. This is intentional (frontend needs 'total' and 'inRangePercent' which backend analyze doesn't return). No bug, just design choice to document.

Bioimpedance tab has no 'Add bioimpedance' button - users cannot add bioimpedance data from the patient profile UI. Only via direct API. Consider adding a creation form similar to the Glucose/Exames tabs.
GlucoseTab sparkline shows reversed order: values are .reverse()'d but the list shows newest first without reversing. Sparkline shows oldest-to-newest which is the correct visual trend direction.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 3 new tabs load correctly with real data, modals work, query invalidation works)

seed_data_creation: Created test data during backend tests: 1 glucose log (110 mg/dL), 1 lab result (TSH 2.5 mIU/L), 2 bioimpedance exams (75.5kg/22.3%/31.5kg and minimal). Also created 1 glucose reading (120 mg/dL) via UI test. All for patient cmm9rj1an002gvv4l7vkuyy1b (TEST_UI_Patient).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 complete. All new features from 8 Codex PRs work correctly: GET /glucose?patientId, GET /glucose/analyze?patientId, GET /lab-results?patientId, GET /bioimpedance?patientId, POST /glucose, POST /lab-results, POST /bioimpedance all pass 100%. Frontend Exames/Glicemia/Bioimpedância tabs in patient profile page fully functional with real API integration. OUTSTANDING BUG (from iter2, not fixed): Consultation autosave in /app/src/lib/api/consultation-api.ts sends wrong SOAP field names to backend - frontend uses {subjetivo,objetivo,avaliacao,plano} but backend UpsertConsultationSectionDto expects {anamnese,exameFisico,diagnostico,prescricao}. Backend tests confirm: test_autosave_consultation_with_frontend_fields_fails passes (400 returned). Auth: NestJS backend localhost:8001, Vite/React frontend localhost:3000, Neon PostgreSQL. The frontend baseURL is /api/v1 (relative, via nginx proxy). Test patient ID: cmm9rj1an002gvv4l7vkuyy1b.
verified_features: GET /api/v1/glucose/analyze?patientId=<id> returns {average, min, max, count, trend} ✓
POST /api/v1/glucose creates log with patientId in body ✓
Frontend Glicemia tab shows stats (Média, Faixa, Total, In range) + Registrar button ✓
Frontend Exames tab shows table + Adicionar exame button ✓
Frontend Bioimpedância tab shows Última data, Gordura corporal, Massa muscular cards ✓
Query invalidation on create: glucose stats update after Registrar submission ✓
All tabs load from real backend (no old stub/placeholder data) ✓
